title: Broken Script - No Bar Lines
description: Deletes the Bar lines of The Broken Script. Simple and useful for when you are making a Video.
body:
![what it do?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76dbfa40872115c1a1907d791b2431b2fe2630ff.png)

It is a Simple resource pack that removes the bar lines from the screen. Very useful for recording, and actually being able to see. It was made as sometimes, even after you do the command to remove the bar lines, it will come back. This resource pack stops that.

BEFORE:

![before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e542ece10cd9ad8faec0e5a047b0b8131386656a.png)

AFTER:

![after](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4d6c933313afbda5cbc88436aec089769c5ec6c.png)
